name: Italian Asparagus Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cooked rice; cooled (cooked in chicken broth)
1 pound Asparagus; blanched and cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Parmesan cheese and breadcrumbs in a medium bowl.
2. Coat each chicken breast with the breadcrumb mixture.
3. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat until hot.
4. Add the chicken; cook and stir for about 5 minutes, or until brown.
5. Remove the chicken and place it in a large bowl.
6. Add spinach, rice, asparagus, tomatoes, onion, walnuts, and basil to the bowl.
7. Toss well.
8. Just before serving, pour the dressing over the salad; toss again to coat.
Each serving provides:
493 calories
28 g. protein
27 g. fat
4 g. saturated fat
37 g. carbohydrate
4 g. dietary fiber
51 mg. cholesterol
781 mg. sodium
Source: Rice & Chicken - New Ideas for Old Favorites
